languages.text: "Но... губернатор-полковником? То есть, тут? Я... как прикажете, Ваша Светлость".
"But... colonel-governor? Here? I mean... As you command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: "Но... губернатор-полковником? То есть, тут? Я... как прикажете, Ваша Светлость".

languages.text: 「でも…城代総督？ここに？いや、その…仰せのままに、{mf|閣下|閣下}。」
languages.original_text: "But... Castellan-Governor? Here? I mean... as you command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: 「でも…城代総督？ここに？いや、その…仰せのままに、{mf|閣下|閣下}。」

languages.text: « Mais... colonel-gouverneure ? Ici ? Non, excusez-moi... À vos ordres, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "But... colonel-governor? Here? I mean... As you command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: « Mais... colonel-gouverneure ? Ici ? Non, excusez-moi... À vos ordres, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: "Fakat... Vali Albay mı? Burada mı? Şey... Emredersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: "But... colonel-governor? Here? I mean... As you command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Fakat... Vali Albay mı? Burada mı? Şey... Emredersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: "Aber ... Colonel-Gouverneurin? Hier? Ich meine ... "Wie Ihr befehlt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: "But... colonel-governor? Here? I mean... As you command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: “可是……总督上校？在这里吗？呃……谨遵您的命令，大人。”
